---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<p class="page-subtitle">Download or view my CV below.</p>

<a href="../assets/cv/cv.pdf" download class="sk-cv-download">
  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5">
    <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/>
    <polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/>
  </svg>
  Download PDF
</a>

<!-- Inline PDF viewer -->
<embed
  src="../assets/cv/cv.pdf"
  type="application/pdf"
  class="sk-pdf-viewer"
  title="Seunguk Kang — CV">
</embed>

<!-- Fallback if PDF not yet added -->
<div id="cv-fallback" style="display:none;">
  <div class="sk-empty-state">
    <div class="empty-icon">📄</div>
    <h3>CV coming soon.</h3>
    <p>The PDF will appear here once uploaded.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Show fallback if embed fails to load (e.g., PDF not yet uploaded)
const embed = document.querySelector('.sk-pdf-viewer');
embed.addEventListener('error', () => {
  embed.style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cv-fallback').style.display = 'block';
});
</script>
```
